calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas A.E. Hesketh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Medical Depo, Inc., dba Drive Medical Design & Manufacturing, a corporation.
No appearance by defendant FASTSERV Mobility, Inc., a corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on April 14, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 17, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff the Medical Depot, Inc., dba Drive Medical Design & Manufacturing, a corporation. and against the Defaulted Defendant FASTSERV Mobility, Inc., a corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,697.00.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,948.80.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $540.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $43,185.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Continued To Jul-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Off Calendar
